title: Police Check Processing Time in Australia: What First-Time Applicants Need to Know
golden_draft: A police check in Australia usually takes one to three business days in common cases, but timing can vary by data source and verification complexity. First-time applicants should prepare ID documents early, confirm form details carefully, and allow extra time before onboarding deadlines. A clear process explanation helps reduce stress and improves completion rates.

title: Employer Checklist: Required Documents for Police Checks
golden_draft: Employers should provide candidates with a simple checklist: valid photo ID, proof of current address, and signed consent forms where policy requires. Teams should confirm document quality upfront, communicate expected turnaround time, and track completion status in one place. This approach improves compliance and reduces onboarding delays.
